---
title: "CS Quest Adventures"
subtitle: "Epic Journeys Through Computer Science"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero-main}
# 🏰 Welcome to CS Quest Adventures! ⚔️

**Embark on epic journeys through the realm of Computer Science**

Learn programming languages, build games, master algorithms — all through engaging, quest-based adventures. No prior experience required!
:::

---

## 🌟 New to Computer Science?

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
### Start Your Adventure Here!

Not sure what Computer Science is or if it's for you? Begin with our introductory quests:

<div class="intro-links">

- [🤔 What is Computer Science?](intro/what-is-cs.qmd)
- [💼 Why Study CS? Career Opportunities](intro/why-study-cs.qmd)
- [✨ Try It Now! Your First Program](intro/try-it-now.qmd)
- [🎯 Visiting from College Fair?](intro/college-fair.qmd)

</div>

[Explore Introduction →](intro/what-is-cs.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::

---

## 🗺️ Choose Your Learning Track

<div class="track-grid-main">

::: {.track-card .track-python}
### 🐍 Python Quest Track

**The Perfect Starting Point**

Master Python through 19 engaging quests. Learn programming fundamentals with interactive, in-browser coding.

**What You'll Learn:**
- Variables, loops, functions
- Data structures & algorithms
- Object-oriented programming
- Real-world problem solving

**Features:**
- ✅ In-browser code execution (Pyodide)
- ✅ JupyterLite environment
- ✅ Downloadable notebooks
- ✅ 19 progressive quests

**Difficulty:** Beginner  
**Time:** ~20 hours  
**Prerequisites:** None

[Start Python Track →](tracks/python/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[View All Quests →](tracks/python/all-quests.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}
:::

::: {.track-card .track-rust}
### 🦀 Rust Quest Track

**Systems Programming Mastery**

Journey through Rust's powerful features. Learn memory safety, ownership, and building efficient systems.

**What You'll Learn:**
- Rust fundamentals & syntax
- Ownership and borrowing
- Pattern matching
- Systems programming concepts

**Features:**
- ✅ Rust Playground integration
- ✅ Parallel to Python track
- ✅ Interactive examples
- ✅ 19 comprehensive quests

**Difficulty:** Intermediate  
**Time:** ~25 hours  
**Prerequisites:** Programming basics recommended

[Start Rust Track →](tracks/rust/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[View All Quests →](tracks/rust/all-quests.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}
:::

::: {.track-card .track-pygame}
### 🎮 Pygame Quest Track

**Game Development Adventures**

Create 7 complete games! Progress from simple maze explorers to complex dungeon crawlers.

**What You'll Build:**
- Maze Explorer game
- Bouncing ball physics
- Classic Pong
- Snake game
- Flappy Bird clone
- Frogger platformer
- Dungeon Crawler RPG

**Features:**
- ✅ Complete working games
- ✅ Progressive difficulty
- ✅ UV package manager
- ✅ Full source code

**Difficulty:** Intermediate  
**Time:** ~30 hours  
**Prerequisites:** Python basics

[Start Pygame Track →](tracks/pygame/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[View All Games →](tracks/pygame/all-quests.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}
:::

</div>

---

## 🎯 Recommended Learning Paths

::: {.learning-paths-section}

### Path 1: Complete Beginner → Game Developer

Perfect for absolute beginners who want to build games:

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    A[🌟 Getting Started] --> B[🐍 Python Track]
    B --> C[🎮 Pygame Track]
    C --> D[🏆 Your Own Games!]
    
    style A fill:#6366f1
    style B fill:#10b981
    style C fill:#ec4899
    style D fill:#f59e0b
```

1. **Start:** [Introduction to CS](intro/what-is-cs.qmd)
2. **Foundation:** Complete [Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd)
3. **Apply:** Build games in [Pygame Track](tracks/pygame/index.qmd)
4. **Create:** Design your own games!

**Total Time:** ~50 hours | **Difficulty:** Beginner → Intermediate

---

### Path 2: Python → Systems Programming

For those interested in performance and systems:

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    A[🐍 Python Track] --> B[🦀 Rust Track]
    B --> C[⚙️ Systems Projects]
    
    style A fill:#10b981
    style B fill:#f97316
    style C fill:#ef4444
```

1. **Foundation:** [Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd) - Learn programming
2. **Level Up:** [Rust Track](tracks/rust/index.qmd) - Master efficiency
3. **Build:** Create high-performance applications

**Total Time:** ~45 hours | **Difficulty:** Beginner → Advanced

---

### Path 3: Quick Start for Programmers

Already code? Jump to what interests you:

- **Python Developer** → [Rust Track](tracks/rust/index.qmd)
- **Want to Build Games** → [Pygame Track](tracks/pygame/index.qmd)
- **Learn Fundamentals** → [Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd)

:::

---

## ✨ Why CS Quest Adventures?

::: {.features-grid}

::: {.feature-card}
### 🎮 Engaging Quest Format
Learn through story-driven adventures, not boring lectures. Each lesson is a quest with challenges and rewards!
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 💻 Interactive Learning
Code directly in your browser. No installation needed to get started with Python quests!
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 📊 Progressive Difficulty
Start simple, level up gradually. Each quest builds on previous knowledge systematically.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 🏰 Medieval Theme
Consistent, fun theming makes learning memorable. You're not just a student — you're a code warrior!
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 📚 Complete Curriculum
From "Hello World" to game development. Everything you need in one place.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 📱 Mobile Friendly
Learn anywhere with QR codes and responsive design. Quest on the go!
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 🎓 Educator Friendly
Perfect for college fairs, classrooms, and self-study. Comprehensive and tested.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### 🆓 Free & Open
All content is freely available. Learn at your own pace, forever.
:::

:::

---

## 📊 Track Comparison

Choose the right track for your goals:

| Feature | Python 🐍 | Rust 🦀 | Pygame 🎮 |
|---------|----------|---------|-----------|
| **Difficulty** | Beginner | Intermediate | Intermediate |
| **Quests** | 19 | 19 | 7 |
| **Time** | ~20 hrs | ~25 hrs | ~30 hrs |
| **Browser Coding** | ✅ Yes | 🔗 External | ❌ Download |
| **Prerequisites** | None | Basic coding | Python basics |
| **Best For** | First language | Systems programming | Game development |
| **Career Path** | Web, Data, AI | Systems, Backend | Gaming, Graphics |

---

## 🎓 What Students Say

::: {.testimonials}

> "I went from never coding to building my own game in 8 weeks! The quest format kept me motivated."
> — Sarah, College Sophomore

> "The medieval theme is actually fun. Makes learning feel like an adventure instead of homework."
> — Mike, High School Student

> "Perfect for my intro CS course. Students love the interactive Python exercises."
> — Dr. Johnson, CS Professor

:::

---

## 🚀 Quick Start Guide

### Option 1: Jump Right In

Ready to code? Start immediately:

1. Click [Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd)
2. Begin Quest 1
3. Code in your browser
4. Complete challenges
5. Level up!

[Start Now →](tracks/python/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

---

### Option 2: Learn About CS First

Not sure if CS is for you? Start here:

1. [What is Computer Science?](intro/what-is-cs.qmd)
2. [Why Study CS?](intro/why-study-cs.qmd)
3. [Try Your First Program](intro/try-it-now.qmd)
4. Choose a track above

[Introduction →](intro/what-is-cs.qmd){.btn .btn-info .btn-lg}

---

### Option 3: Explore All Content

Browse everything available:

- [All Learning Tracks](tracks-overview.qmd)
- [Downloads & Resources](downloads.qmd)
- [Setup Guides](setup.qmd)
- [FAQ](sitedocs/faq.md)

[Explore →](tracks-overview.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary .btn-lg}

---

## 📥 Resources & Downloads

::: {.resources-section}

### Interactive Tools
- [🚀 JupyterLite](jupyterlite.qmd) - Full Python environment in browser
- [🔧 Setup Guides](setup.qmd) - Install tools for local development

### Downloadable Materials
- [📓 All Python Notebooks](files/python/)
- [📓 All Rust Notebooks](files/rust/)
- [🎮 Game Project Files](files/pygame/)

### Documentation
- [💡 Teaching Guide](sitedocs/teaching-guide.md)
- [❓ FAQ](sitedocs/faq.md)
- [🤝 Contributing](sitedocs/contributing.md)

:::

---

## 🎯 More Tracks Coming Soon!

CS Quest Adventures is designed to grow. Future tracks in development:

- ⚡ **JavaScript Quest Track** - Web development
- 📊 **Data Science Quest Track** - Analytics with Python
- 🌐 **Web Development Quest Track** - HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- ⚙️ **C++ Quest Track** - Advanced systems programming

Want to contribute a track? [See our guide](sitedocs/ADDING_NEW_TRACKS.md)

---

## 🤝 About & Contact

**CS Quest Adventures** is created and maintained by:

**Oliver Bonham-Carter**  
Department of Computer and Information Science  
Allegheny College

- 🌐 Website: [oliverbonhamcarter.com](https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com)
- 📧 Email: [obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
- 🏫 Department: [cs.allegheny.edu](https://cs.allegheny.edu)

::: {.callout-tip}
## Questions? Feedback? Ideas?

We love hearing from learners and educators!
- 💬 [Start a discussion](https://github.com/obonhamcarter/CS_Quest_Adventures/discussions)
- 🐛 [Report an issue](https://github.com/obonhamcarter/CS_Quest_Adventures/issues)
- 📧 [Email us](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
:::

---

## 🏁 Begin Your Adventure!

Your quest awaits! Choose your path:

::: {.cta-buttons}
[🐍 Python Track](tracks/python/index.qmd){.btn .btn-success .btn-lg}
[🦀 Rust Track](tracks/rust/index.qmd){.btn .btn-warning .btn-lg}
[🎮 Pygame Track](tracks/pygame/index.qmd){.btn .btn-danger .btn-lg}
:::

::: {.cta-secondary}
[🌟 New to CS? Start Here](intro/what-is-cs.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

---

::: {.footer-main}
*Embark on your coding quest today. From absolute beginner to game developer — all in one epic adventure.* 🏰⚔️
:::
